records.instructions: EPCRBM1- elev8 premier custom repeatable bubberl mopuhtpiece 1    (COLORS-   Yellow/little Green, Green, little Yellow, Black/little Unobtainium, Little Unobtainium/little Cobalt, White/little Ruby Red, little Unobtainium/Slyme, White/little Unobtainium.                   Once colors are added, you will then add clear on top of the colors.  Trying to lightly marble the colors, but not too much heat that its hard to lay the clear on top of the color.  The clear is what makes it thick and also makes the color POP.

records.catalog_name: Bubbler Mouthpieces — Inner Tube Production
records.search_aliases: bubbler mouthpieces, bubbler mouthpieces — inner tube production, inner tube production, mouth piece, mouthpiece
records.instructions: 8.0 X 1.50 Tube. Useing a (pre-preped) piece that should be 7" long w/ 1 polished end, use 2 pieces of leather to chuck up the (ruff end) on (left) side of the lathe hooked up w/ blow tube. (Polished end needs to be out at this point). 12 X 1.0 Tube. Chuck new tube up on the (right side). Open 12mm tube w/ no flare, sleeve 8mm tube (1.5") into 12mm tube. Preheat 12mm tube to remove all condensation. Keeping the flame at the bottom of 12mm, seal both tubes together by blowing out to standard thickness. Cut 12mm tube off (.5") past 8mm tube, blow out till rounded. Place (2) holes aprox. (.25") from your weld makinig sure to keep them 180 dergees from each other. Remove and place in wood block to cool,(no annealing required).

records.catalog_name: Dab Bat — Clear M/P & Roll stop
records.search_aliases: clear m/p & roll stop, dab bat, dab bat — clear m/p & roll stop
records.instructions: Start with a hot part, Do the roll stop first placing it right on the billow. Next peel very small amount of clear off the mouth piece end (just the meat), heat up only about 1/3 of the glass at the end to cleanup wall thickness and blow a hole through the end to finish mouthpiece. These should all look clean and uniform. Next Peel the blowtube off sparing as much of the blowtube as possible for the next part. Them return to the kiln leaving the mouthpiece end out to cool for the next step. +$5 bonus for groups of 20.

records.catalog_name: Dab Bat — Clear M/P & Roll stop + Dab tip

records.catalog_name: Dab Bat — Color M/P & Roll stop
records.search_aliases: color m/p & roll stop, dab bat, dab bat — color m/p & roll stop
records.instructions: Done with the following-- Unobtainium, Ruby, Mystery adv, Cobalt,Star White, Milky Pink, Jet Black and Double Amber Purple. Start with a hot part, Do the roll stop first placing it right on the billow. Next peel very small amount of clear off the mouth piece end (just the meat), heat up the very end of the glass and get the wall thickness very thin. Next Heat up about 1.5" Once color is nice and wet heat the thin closed end a bit and connect the two and in the same motion start to blow through color and peel from rod. If you did this correctly  you should already have air in your color, now heat the ball as needed to get the correct size and shape and blow a clean hole through the end to finish mouthpiece. These should all look clean and uniform. Next Peel the blowtube off sparing as much of the blowtube as possible for the next part. Them return to the kiln leaving the mouthpiece end out to cool for the next step. +$5 bonus for groups of 20.

records.catalog_name: Elev8 Premier Boro Dab Straws — Clear Dab Straw $4.37 — epdsc
records.search_aliases: clear dab straw $4.37, elev8 premier boro dab straws, elev8 premier boro dab straws — clear dab straw $4.37 — epdsc, epdsc
records.instructions: Using premade straws, Start by closing off the end and getting all the booboo out of there. Once thats done you'll want to start working a ball of glass slightly smaller then what you want to end up with and begin blowing into the size and shape you need and blow a clean hole out the end then allow bench cool. Once part is cool a decal can then be put on and anneal. See video for details.

records.catalog_name: Elev8 Premier Boro Dab Straws — Colored Dab Butter $7
records.search_aliases: colored dab butter $7, elev8 premier boro dab straws, elev8 premier boro dab straws — colored dab butter $7
records.instructions: Done on the lathe. Using pre-cut pieces cut at 15". Start by blocking one end off w/ an earplug and chuck into lathe. Begin by heating 2" of the tube in the center and using a small flame begin your pull. After pull is complete work 0.75" of glass on the left side of the pull, compress slightly and make a bubble roughly a 1/2" in diameter, and repet on the right side. Now go back to the left side and 1" to the left of the bubble make a meria. Repet on the right side. Now stop the lathe and put a 0.25" deep push in each ball and add a small flat spot on each meria always working from left to right. See video for complete details. After pieces are cool score in the center of the pull, snap apart and polish.

records.catalog_name: Elev8 Premier Boro Dab Straws — Colored Dab Straw $6.3 — epdscm
records.search_aliases: colored dab straw $6.3, elev8 premier boro dab straws, elev8 premier boro dab straws — colored dab straw $6.3 — epdscm, epdscm
records.instructions: Done with the following-- Unobtainium, Ruby, Mystery adv, Cobalt,Star White, Milky Pink Jet Black. Start by closing off the end of the straw nice, clean and thin. then start working a ball of the selcted color using about 1" or so. Once color is nice and wet heat the thin closed end on the straw a bit and connect the two and in the same motion start to blow through color and peel from rod. If you did this correctly  you should already have air in your color, now heat the ball as needed to get the correct size and shape and blow a clean hole out the end then allow to bench cool. Once part is cool a decal can then be put on and anneal. See video for details.

records.catalog_name: Elev8 Premier Boro Dab Straws — Cut and polish - Per 10
records.search_aliases: cut and polish - per 10, elev8 premier boro dab straws, elev8 premier boro dab straws — cut and polish - per 10
records.instructions: Simply score in the center of the pull and fire polish smooth.

records.catalog_name: Elev8 Premier Boro Dab Straws — Switchball Doughnut Mouthpiece 11.09 — epdssdm
records.search_aliases: elev8 premier boro dab straws, elev8 premier boro dab straws — switchball doughnut mouthpiece 11.09 — epdssdm, epdssdm, mouth piece, mouthpiece, switchball doughnut mouthpiece 11.09
records.instructions: Using premade straws, Start by marking the straw to length and flame cut to size and reopen with a small flare. Now take China switchball and connect to the flare. Work your color nice and clean and make a ball roughly an 1.5" in diameter and flatten. Now using a tungsten pick pierce a hole through the center and form into a doughnut with a .5" hole then allow to bench cool Once part is cool a decal can then be put on and anneal. See video for details.

records.catalog_name: Elev8R Parts — 19mm Elev8R Heater
records.search_aliases: 19mm elev8r heater, elev8r parts, elev8r parts — 19mm elev8r heater
records.instructions: Using a 19mm male China joint (DBV Wand). Start by scoring the joint about 3/8" from the clear glass. Repeat this step for the quanity  you need to do. Then using a hot punty method crack and discard the end of the joint. Now using the lap wheel clean the base of the joint where the crack was made. This should leave about 1/4"-3/8" of the joint. Nice clean and straight. Now go through and sharpie mark all joints 1.75" from the top of the joint (where the clean glass meets ground glass).
records.review_notes: Review before import: no positive retail or blower-pay value found.

records.catalog_name: Elev8R Parts — 19mm Elev8R Heater prep
records.search_aliases: 19mm elev8r heater prep, elev8r parts, elev8r parts — 19mm elev8r heater prep
records.instructions: Start by marking all the wands to be done @ 7.0" with a sharpie. ( Finished wand can be no more then 6.75" total to fit in package properly) Flame cut off the end at your mark and once thats done you'll want to start working a ball of glass slightly smaller then what you want to end up with and begin blowing into the size and shape you need and blow a clean hole out the end then allow bench cool. Once part is cool a decal can then be put on and anneal. See video for details.
records.review_notes: Review before import: no positive retail or blower-pay value found.

records.catalog_name: Elev8R Parts — AG Wand
records.search_aliases: ag wand, custom wand, elev8r parts, elev8r parts — ag wand, wand
records.instructions: Start by placeing precut 14mm joint into right side of the lathe.Then place your precut 19mm female joint into joint tool on left side of lathe and secue with metal clip. Start heating female joint to correct length leaving aprx. 5/8" of clear from ground glass. Remove excess and with a slite puff assist with popping a hole no larger then .5". Once this is done bring your 14mm in close to joint even heat and just mack slite contact. Once this is done use the hand torch to assist with your shrink and meria. (See video for details)

records.catalog_name: Elev8R Parts — AG WPA

records.catalog_name: Elev8R Parts — STD WAND
records.search_aliases: custom wand, elev8r parts, elev8r parts — std wand, std wand, wand
records.instructions: Using 12mm tube precut @ 6" Start by blocking one end (the ruffest side) of the 12mm w/ear plug and chuck into the rightside of the lathe. Then place your precut 19mm female joint into joint tool on left side of lathe and secue with metal clip. Start heating female joint to correct length leaving aprx. 5/8" of clear from ground glass. Remove excess and with a slite puff assist with poping a hole no larger then .5". Once this is done bring your 12mm in close to joint even heat and just mack slite contact. Once this is done use the hand torch to assist with your shrink and meria. (See video for details)

records.catalog_name: Elev8R Parts — STD WPA
records.search_aliases: elev8r parts, elev8r parts — std wpa, std wpa
records.instructions: Using pre made prep flame cut at the center of your mark pull any excess material off and make a clean beaker base. Then using a ti pick start about 1/4' from the rounded bottom and drill a small area with a small flame and add a push through the tube to about an 1/8" from the other side being cautious not to touch the other side. Turn the tube 1/4 turn and move in 1/4" and repeat till you have 4 pushes that make it 360 degrees. Now go to to end where you made the first push and on the complete opposit side blow a small carb hole.
